Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Number of times 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurs in the entire event log
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities

Name: Percentage of process variants that include 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' following 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' that appears after 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Number of cases where 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' is directly preceded by 'First Look-Your updates are overdue'
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities for cases where activity 'First Look-Your updates are overdue' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurrences relative to 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' occurrences
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' appearing in variants that end with 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Percentage of cases containing 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' that also contain 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' earlier in the trace
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Number of times 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurs within 7 days after 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities for cases where activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities that are part of accepted manuscript pathways (i.e., traces ending with 'RW-EIC Accept' or 'RSW-EIC Accept')
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'RW-EIC Accept'

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' in comparison to 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Percentage of process variants where 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' appears only once per case
Metric: the average of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' events that occur after at least one occurrence of 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' in the same case
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Ratio of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' to total number of administrative checkpoint activities (e.g., compared to 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion', 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment', and 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation')
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'
